name: chrome-devtools
tagline: Uses Chrome DevTools via MCP for browser debugging, automation, performance and network inspection; excludes --slim mode.
verdict: Clear workflow ordering (navigate to wait to snapshot to interact), a good explicit exclusion note (--slim mode) and troubleshooting links for tool/launch failures. Minor supply-chain warning from unpinned npx @latest MCP install; no defined output shape for findings and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: `npx chrome-devtools-mcp@latest --help` and the sample MCP config both pin to unpinned @latest of the server package.
No defined output artifact or report shape — debugging workflow ends in ad hoc findings with no required format.
No version field or changelog anywhere in the skill.
